title: Immunofluorescence protocol of Pax7 and androgen receptor for frozen muscle sections with unmasking
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"482rh","text":"Immunofluorescence protocol of Pax7 on muscle tissues is a critical step for studying skeletal muscle regeneration. Here, I describe the simple protocol for Pax7 for isopentane-frozen muscle tissues with unmasking. Androgen receptor, a member of the nuclear receptor superfamily, can be stained with this protocol to see the double positive cells. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Fix the slides with 4% PFA/PBS for 5 min at room temperature. Do not air dry the samples before fixing. It may increase the background signal and lose androgen receptoer signal.
Wash the slides in PBS three times for 5 min.
Place the slides into a slide chamber in PBS
Fill a beaker with 500 ml of Sodium citrate.
Place the beaker on the hotplate and turn it on full power. While wating for the beaker to come to a boil, keep the sections in PBS.
Once boiling, transfer the slides from PBS to the beaker. Use care with hot solution. Use forceps.
Remove the beaker from the hotplate and let the beaker cool for 20 min.
Remove the slide chamber from the beaker.
Wash slides in PBS three times for 5 min.
Block the slides with 5% Goat serum/0.05% Triton X-100/PBS for 1h at room temperature. Prepare 100 µl of 5% Goat serum/0.05% Triton X-100/PBS per slide.
Drain the slides for a few seconds (do not rinse) and wipe around the sections with tissue paper.

Dilute primary antibodies as follows in 5% Goat serum/0.05% Triton X-100/PBS. Prepare 100 µl antibody solution per slide. Add primary antibody solution to the slides. 100 µL, 5% Goat serum/0.05% Triton X-100/PBS 5 µL, anti-Pax7 (mouse IgG1, 1/20) 0.25 µL, anti-androgen receptor (rabbit, 1/400)
Wash the slides in PBS three times for 5 min.

Dilute secondary antibodies as follows in 5% Goat serum/0.05% Triton X-100/PBS. Prepare 100 µl antibody solution per slide. Add secondary antibody solution to the slides. undetermined, 5% Goat serum/0.05% Triton X-100/PBS 0.1 µL, anti-mouse IgG1 568 (1/1000) undetermined, anti-rabbit IgG 488 (1/1000) undetermined, DAPI (1/2000)
Incubate for 1h at room temperature protected from light.
Wash the slides in PBS three times for 5 min.
Mount using ProLong™ Glass Antifade Mountant and add coverslips.
creator: Hiroshi Sakai
